heading: Environmental impact statements relating to defense facilities of Department of Energy
label: 7274 Environmental impact statements relating to defense facilities of Department of Energy
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of Energy National Security and Military Applications of Nuclear Energy Authorization Act of 1982, and not as part of the Department of Energy Organization Act which comprises this chapter.

National Environmental Policy Act Compliance Report Requirement, , , directed Secretary of Energy, not later than 30 days after the end of each quarter of fiscal years 1991 and 1992, to submit to Congress a brief report on Department of Energy’s compliance with National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ( et seq.), which was to contain a brief description of each proposed action to be taken by the Department of Energy, the environmental impact of which was not clearly insignificant, and a description of the steps taken or proposed to be taken by the Department of Energy to assess the environmental impact of the proposed action, and if the Secretary found that the proposed action of the Department of Energy would have no significant impact, the Secretary was to include the rationale for that determination.Pub. L. 101–510, div. C, title XXXI, § 3133104 Stat. 183242 U.S.C. 4321Nov. 5, 1990

children.label: A
children.text: the Secretary has notified the Committees on Armed Services of the Senate and the House of Representatives of his intent to prepare such statement and a period of thirty days has expired after the date on which such notice was received by such committees; or

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary has received from each such committee, before the expiration of such thirty-day period, a written notice that the committee agrees with the decision of the Secretary regarding the preparation of such statement.
The provisions of paragraph (1) shall not apply in the case of any environmental impact statement on which the Secretary began preparation before .December 4, 1981
